title: Cross-Session Governance State
description: Persistent governance state accumulated across multiple agentic sessions. Unlike checkpoints (ephemeral, per-session save/restore), this state represents long-lived governance memory: metrics trends, threshold tuning history, persona weight adjustments, and work queue context. Stored in .governance-state/ and tracked by git.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this session state format.

state_id.description: Unique identifier for this state file. Stable across updates — generated once on creation.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent state update.

governance_version.description: Git commit SHA of the .ai submodule at the time of the last state update.

session_counter.description: Total number of agentic sessions that have contributed to this state.

metrics_history.description: Rolling window of autonomy metrics snapshots. Each entry references an autonomy-metrics report. Used to detect trends and inform threshold tuning.

retention_policy.description: How many snapshots to retain and when to prune.

max_snapshots.description: Maximum number of snapshots to retain. Default: 52 (one year of weekly reports).

max_age_days.description: Maximum age of a snapshot before pruning. Default: 365 days.

snapshots.description: Ordered list of metrics snapshots (most recent last).

threshold_tuning.description: History of governance threshold adjustments derived from retrospective analysis. Each entry records what changed, why, and whether it was auto-applied or human-approved.

current_overrides.description: Active threshold overrides applied on top of policy defaults. Keys are dotted policy paths (e.g., 'default.confidence_threshold').

history.description: Ordered log of threshold changes (most recent last).

persona_weights.description: Current and historical persona weight adjustments derived from effectiveness scoring. References persona-effectiveness reports.

current_weights.description: Active persona weight overrides. Keys are persona names, values are weight multipliers.

^[a-z][a-z0-9-]+$.description: Weight multiplier for this persona. 1.0 = default weight.

history.description: Ordered log of weight changes (most recent last).

work_queue.description: Cross-session work queue state. Tracks issue lifecycle context that persists between sessions — priority overrides, dependency relationships, and learned context about recurring issue patterns.

known_issues.description: Issues the governance system has previously interacted with. Used to provide context to new sessions without re-reading full issue history.

priority_overrides.description: Manual priority overrides set by humans or governance decisions. Keys are issue numbers as strings.

set_by.description: Who set the override (human username or 'agent').

dependency_graph.description: Known dependencies between issues that affect scheduling order.

issue.description: Issue number that has a dependency.

depends_on.description: Issue number that must be completed first.

governance_decisions.description: Record of significant governance decisions that should inform future sessions. Not a full audit trail (that's in run manifests), but key decisions that affect ongoing behavior.

policy_exceptions.description: Active policy exceptions granted by human reviewers.

policy_profile.description: Which policy profile this exception applies to.

rule.description: The specific policy rule being excepted.

granted_by.description: Username of the human who granted the exception.

expires_at.description: When the exception expires. Null for permanent exceptions.

suppressed_findings.description: Panel findings that have been permanently suppressed (false positives confirmed by humans).

finding_pattern.description: Pattern or hash identifying the suppressed finding.

reason.description: Why this finding is a confirmed false positive.

suppressed_by.description: Username of the human who confirmed suppression.

notes.description: Free-text notes about the current state. Updated by agents or humans as needed.

metrics_snapshot.description: A reference to an autonomy-metrics report with key summary values inlined for trend analysis without loading the full report.

report_id.description: Reference to the full autonomy-metrics report.

period_end.description: End of the reporting period for this snapshot.

merge_success_rate.description: PR merge success rate for this period.

human_intervention_rate.description: Human intervention rate for this period.

avg_review_cycles.description: Average review cycles per PR for this period.

governance_approval_rate.description: Governance auto-approval rate for this period.

original_value.description: The default value from the policy profile.

policy_path.description: Dotted path to the threshold in the policy profile (e.g., 'default.confidence_threshold').

retrospective_report_id.description: Reference to the retrospective report that triggered this change, if applicable.

approved_by.description: Human who approved the change. Null for auto-applied changes.

weight_change.description: A historical persona weight adjustment entry.

timestamp.description: When the weight change was applied.

persona_name.description: Name of the persona whose weight was adjusted.

source.description: How this weight change was initiated.

effectiveness_report_id.description: Reference to the persona effectiveness report that triggered this change, if applicable.

approved_by.description: Human who approved the change. Null for auto-applied changes.

known_issue.description: Summarized context about a previously-encountered issue for cross-session continuity.

title.description: Issue title at the time of last interaction.

last_interaction.description: When the governance system last interacted with this issue.

pr_number.description: Associated PR number, if one was created.

context_notes.description: Brief notes from the agent about this issue — edge cases encountered, decisions made, things the next session should know.
